name: 2 Crescent Gardens Guest House
description: 2 Crescent Gardens Guest House is situated in Bath, just a short walk from attractions. Rooms feature flat-screen TVs and tea/coffee making facilities. Breakfast includes a full English offering. Guests appreciate the warm atmosphere, cleanliness, and friendly service provided by the staff.
short_description: 2 Crescent Gardens Guest House is situated in Bath, just a short walk from attractions.

name: 8 Holland Street Townhouse at 23 Brock Street
description: Housed in a historic building, this townhouse offers comfortable rooms with free WiFi and private bathrooms. Located steps from Royal Crescent and The Circus Bath, it's a short walk to Bath Abbey and The Roman Baths. Each room includes a kitchenette, adding convenience for guests.
short_description: Housed in a historic building, this townhouse offers comfortable rooms with free WiFi and private bathrooms.

name: Abbey Hotel Bath
description: Located in Bath, Abbey Hotel Bath is housed in a historic building just a short walk from Bath Abbey and The Roman Baths. Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. The restaurant serves British cuisine with various dietary options. Convenient amenities include tea and coffee makers, and hairdryers.
short_description: Located in Bath, Abbey Hotel Bath is housed in a historic building just a short

name: Abbots Grange
description: Abbots Grange is an adults-only hotel set in extensive grounds in Broadway. Dating back to 1320, the hotel features rooms with four-poster beds and en-suite bathrooms. A full English breakfast is served in the dining room, and it's conveniently close to the village center.
short_description: Abbots Grange is an adults-only hotel set in extensive grounds in Broadway.

name: Bath Backpackers
description: Bath Backpackers offers budget accommodations in a community-focused hostel, just a 2-minute walk from bus and train stations. It features mixed and female-only dorm rooms with shared bathrooms. A fully equipped kitchen is available, and the hostel has a spacious common area for guests. Free WiFi is accessible throughout.
short_description: Bath Backpackers offers budget accommodations in a community-focused hostel, jus

name: Bath YMCA Hostel
description: Bath YMCA Hostel is centrally located, within walking distance to The Circus Bath and Royal Crescent. Amenities include a sun terrace, lounge, and a fitness room. The hostel offers both private and shared accommodations, along with a 24-hour front desk, making it suitable for various travelers.
short_description: Bath YMCA Hostel is centrally located, within walking distance to The Circus Bath and Royal Crescent.

name: Bathen House Boutique Hotel
description: Bathen House Boutique Hotel offers a shared lounge and free WiFi in Bath. Built in 1910, it features well-equipped rooms, a private bathroom, and tea and coffee facilities. Breakfast options include a Full English and à la carte choices. Guests mention excellent service and cleanliness.
short_description: Bathen House Boutique Hotel offers a shared lounge and free WiFi in Bath.

name: Best Western Compass Inn
description: Best Western Compass Inn in Tormarton features family rooms with modern amenities, dining options with local cuisine, and a pub. The hotel is approximately 34 km from Bristol Airport and is suitable for hikers on the Cotswold Way.
short_description: Best Western Compass Inn in Tormarton features family rooms with modern amenitie

name: Broad Street Townhouse
description: Broad Street Townhouse features private bathrooms and modern amenities, including a work desk and a sofa bed. The onsite restaurant serves British cuisine, with vegetarian options available. Located in the city centre, it's a short stroll to significant landmarks such as Bath Abbey.
short_description: Broad Street Townhouse features private bathrooms and modern amenities, including a work desk and a sofa bed.

name: Central Studios Gloucester Place
description: Gloucester Place Studio provides flexible accommodations in Cheltenham, close to shops and cafes. Rooms come with fridges, microwaves, and flat-screen TVs, along with shared bathroom facilities. The studio makes a practical choice for hikers, offering essential amenities for a comfortable stay.
short_description: Gloucester Place Studio provides flexible accommodations in Cheltenham, close to shops and cafes.

name: Citrus Hotel Cheltenham
description: Citrus Hotel Cheltenham is a modern place just a 2-minute walk from the town center. Rooms come equipped with flat-screen TVs, free WiFi, and tea/coffee-making facilities. All rates include a continental breakfast. Guests also benefit from discounts at selected local restaurants during their stay.
short_description: Citrus Hotel Cheltenham is a modern place just a 2-minute walk from the town center.

name: Cleeve Hill Hotel
description: At the peak of the Cotswolds, Cleeve Hill Hotel provides panoramic views and features 13 en suite rooms with organic amenities, comfortable beds, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Guests can enjoy a lounge with freshly brewed coffee, plus a Full English breakfast. Dietary needs can be accommodated.
short_description: At the peak of the Cotswolds, Cleeve Hill Hotel provides panoramic views and fea

name: Cotswold Charm George Barn
description: Cotswold Charm George Barn offers a garden, free WiFi, and private check-in for guests. The guesthouse has comfortable family rooms with kitchen facilities and is situated close to the village center, providing easy access to local attractions.
short_description: Cotswold Charm George Barn offers a garden, free WiFi, and private check-in for guests.

name: Cotswold Grange
description: Cotswold Grange, a period property in Pittville, features stylish rooms with modern amenities. The on-site bar serves premium drinks. Located within walking distance of the town center, it's a solid choice for travelers seeking comfort. Guests often highlight the cleanliness and welcoming staff.
short_description: Cotswold Grange, a period property in Pittville, features stylish rooms with modern amenities.

name: Cotswold House Hotel and Spa
description: Cotswold House Hotel and Spa offers 28 rooms in Chipping Campden, paired with landscaped gardens. The hotel features two dining areas, serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner. The spa includes hydrotherapy and treatment rooms. Guests often mention the friendly staff and excellent food.
short_description: Cotswold House Hotel and Spa offers 28 rooms in Chipping Campden, paired with landscaped gardens.

name: Coxhorne Glamping
description: Coxhorne Glamping is a countryside retreat near Cheltenham, set on a working farm in the Cotswolds. It offers well-equipped glamping tents with comfortable interiors, rustic bathroom facilities, and outdoor social spaces.
short_description: Coxhorne Glamping is a countryside retreat near Cheltenham, set on a working farm in the Cotswolds.

name: Croft House Guest Suite
description: Croft House Guest Suite in Painswick provides comfortable rooms with independent access. Guests enjoy a continental breakfast with pastries and seasonal fruits. The garden room provides outdoor seating. Reviews highlight the welcoming atmosphere and location for exploring the area.
short_description: Croft House Guest Suite in Painswick provides comfortable rooms with independent access.

name: Cross Hands Hotel
description: Cross Hands Hotel is a historic 14th-century inn with a pub and restaurant, located near junction 18 of the M4. It has free Wi-Fi and traditional ales. Guests mention friendly service, clean rooms, and good food from the restaurant.
short_description: Cross Hands Hotel is a historic 14th-century inn with a pub and restaurant, located near junction 18 of the M4.

name: Crown Inn at Tolldown
description: Crown Inn at Tolldown offers stylish self-contained rooms and a restaurant featuring regional dishes. The hotel has easy access to Cotswold Way for hiking. Rooms have flat-screen TVs and tea/coffee facilities. Pets are allowed with amenities for them.
short_description: Crown Inn at Tolldown offers stylish self-contained rooms and a restaurant featuring regional dishes.

name: Crown and Trumpet Inn
description: Crown and Trumpet Inn in Broadway is set in a historic structure, featuring a traditional restaurant with British cuisine, including vegetarian and gluten-free choices. Rooms come with private bathrooms and WiFi. Guests often mention the friendly staff and the comfortable atmosphere.
short_description: Crown and Trumpet Inn in Broadway is set in a historic structure, featuring a tr

name: Dormy House Hotel
description: Located just outside Broadway village, Dormy House Hotel is a 17th-century converted farmhouse with spacious en-suite rooms, some featuring four-poster beds and garden views. Guests can access the Dormy House Spa, which includes a pool and thermal suite. Dining options range from an elegant restaurant to a casual lighter option. The atmosphere is relaxed, and staff are friendly and attentive.
short_description: Located just outside Broadway village, Dormy House Hotel is a 17th-century conve

name: Dukes Bath
description: Dukes Bath offers a comfortable guest house experience with modern amenities in a historic setting. Rooms feature private bathrooms and city views. An à la carte breakfast is available, and additional services include concierge and daily housekeeping. It's a walkable distance from local attractions.
short_description: Dukes Bath offers a comfortable guest house experience with modern amenities in a historic setting.

name: Eight
description: Eight offers comfortable accommodations in central Bath, just minutes from Bath Abbey. The hotel features modern family rooms with amenities like free WiFi. Guests can enjoy various breakfast options, including full English and vegetarian.
short_description: Eight offers comfortable accommodations in central Bath, just minutes from Bath Abbey.

name: Eight Bells Inn
description: The Eight Bells Inn is a traditional hotel with individually styled en suite rooms. It features free Wi-Fi, a quality restaurant, and a bar with a courtyard. Guests can enjoy a range of breakfast options, all served in a cozy, welcoming atmosphere.
short_description: The Eight Bells Inn is a traditional hotel with individually styled en suite rooms.

name: Ellenborough Park
description: Ellenborough Park is a historic manor house set on a 90-acre estate, featuring 61 unique rooms. Guests can dine at various restaurants or in the outdoor Spa Garden Retreat, which offers a hot tub and sauna. A private track leads to Cheltenham Racecourse, enhancing guest convenience.
short_description: Ellenborough Park is a historic manor house set on a 90-acre estate, featuring 61 unique rooms.

name: Forthay Bed and Breakfast
description: Forthay Bed and Breakfast in North Nibley provides adults-only accommodation with a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi. A traditional restaurant serves dinner with dietary menus. Guests can expect a warm welcome and enjoy the comfortable setting. The host is particularly noted for being attentive to guest needs.
short_description: Forthay Bed and Breakfast in North Nibley provides adults-only accommodation with a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi.

name: Francis Hotel Bath
description: The Francis Hotel, Bath is a collection of restored Georgian townhouses on Queen Square. Each individually designed room includes HD televisions and free WiFi. Emberwood, the hotel's restaurant, serves seasonal dishes. Guests appreciate the stylish decor and helpful staff.
short_description: The Francis Hotel, Bath is a collection of restored Georgian townhouses on Queen Square.

name: George Apartments
description: George Apartments provides family rooms with kitchenettes and private bathrooms. Each apartment includes free WiFi, a dining area, and essential amenities. The location is central, suitable for exploring Broadway, and features easy access to hiking opportunities.
short_description: George Apartments provides family rooms with kitchenettes and private bathrooms.

name: Greencourt Loft
description: Greencourt Loft in Stonehouse has spacious, pet-friendly rooms that come with private balconies and kitchenettes. Guests can access a sun terrace, outdoor seating, and free WiFi. A variety of breakfast options are prepared ahead of arrival, and the loft is known for its helpful host and quiet location.
short_description: Greencourt Loft in Stonehouse has spacious, pet-friendly rooms that come with private balconies and kitchenettes.

name: Harington's Boutique Hotel
description: Harington's Boutique Hotel in Bath is located on a cobbled street, close to major attractions. The hotel features modern bedrooms and a hot tub for private hire. It allows one pet per room. Guests mention a comfortable atmosphere, friendly staff, and a continental breakfast.
short_description: Harington's Boutique Hotel in Bath is located on a cobbled street, close to major attractions.

name: Holiday Inn Express Bath by IHG
description: Holiday Inn Express Bath is located a short walk from the Roman centre of Bath. It provides free Wi-Fi, a spacious lounge-bar, and a buffet breakfast that includes both continental and hot items. The modern rooms each feature air-conditioning and a work desk. Casual dining options are available.
short_description: Holiday Inn Express Bath is located a short walk from the Roman centre of Bath.

name: House of George W Davies
description: House of George W Davies offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views. The hotel includes a restaurant serving European cuisine, a bar, and free WiFi. A terrace and garden allow for pleasant outdoor experiences.
short_description: House of George W Davies offers comfortable rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and garden views.

name: Lansdown Grove Hotel
description: At Lansdown Grove Hotel in Bath, guests can find a restaurant, bar, and garden. The hotel has a 24-hour front desk, free WiFi, and comfortable rooms with private bathrooms. Guests like the friendly staff, breakfast options, and the location near popular attractions.
short_description: At Lansdown Grove Hotel in Bath, guests can find a restaurant, bar, and garden.

name: Laurel House
description: Laurel House offers classic accommodations in Cheltenham with garden views and private bathrooms. Rooms are equipped with kitchenettes and modern conveniences. A variety of breakfast options are included. Guests have found the hosts welcoming and the atmosphere comfortable for their overnight trips.
short_description: Laurel House offers classic accommodations in Cheltenham with garden views and private bathrooms.

name: London Inn
description: London Inn, located in Cheltenham, has a historic charm with modern amenities. Rooms come with private bathrooms and TVs. A restaurant serves hearty breakfasts and classic pub fare. Guests can relax in the bar or garden. It's a short walk to local attractions and provides good value for a night's stay.
short_description: London Inn, located in Cheltenham, has a historic charm with modern amenities.

name: Noel Arms
description: Noel Arms in Chipping Campden is an award-winning 16th-century hotel with unique rooms and a restaurant serving local produce. Guests have access to a nearby spa. The hotel also features an inviting bar and coffee shop. Reviewers highlight the helpful staff and good breakfasts.
short_description: Noel Arms in Chipping Campden is an award-winning 16th-century hotel with unique

name: Number 17 Bath
description: Number 17 Bath is a boutique townhouse in a historic 19th-century building. Rooms have en-suite bathrooms with period features and modern appliances. Guests can enjoy an onsite car park. It's conveniently located near shops and restaurants, a short walk from key city sites.
short_description: Number 17 Bath is a boutique townhouse in a historic 19th-century building.

name: Rising Sun Hotel
description: The Rising Sun is located near the highest point in the Cotswolds, Cleeve Hill. It features a restaurant, bar, and heated garden terrace serving modern and traditional British dishes. Guests have access to free Wi-Fi, and many rooms offer scenic views across the countryside.
short_description: The Rising Sun is located near the highest point in the Cotswolds, Cleeve Hill.

name: Royal George Hotel
description: Set in Birdlip village, Royal George Hotel features free WiFi and serves food throughout the day until 22:00. Rooms include satellite TVs and tea/coffee facilities; some open onto the garden. Guests can dine outdoors or enjoy live music events. The hotel is noted for its friendly staff and hearty breakfast.
short_description: Set in Birdlip village, Royal George Hotel features free WiFi and serves food throughout the day until 22:00.

name: Russell's
description: In the heart of Broadway, Russell's features boutique bedrooms with period details and free Wi-Fi. The restaurant serves local dishes, including cooked breakfasts. Rooms come with luxury bathrooms, flat-screen TVs, and some offer scenic views. Guests often mention friendly staff and an ideal location.
short_description: In the heart of Broadway, Russell's features boutique bedrooms with period details and free Wi-Fi.

name: St. Michaels Bistro
description: St. Michaels Bistro in Painswick provides comfortable rooms with modern amenities. Its restaurant serves British and European dishes including vegetarian and gluten-free options. Reviews praise the staff and the homemade breakfast.
short_description: St. Michaels Bistro in Painswick provides comfortable rooms with modern amenitie

name: Stables at The Black Horse Inn
description: Stables at The Black Horse Inn features a cozy guest house with one bedroom and two bathrooms. It comes with free Wi-Fi and a fully equipped kitchen. Pet-friendly, the property also has a garden view. Guests enjoy the ambiance and the local pub's food, known for its good menu.
short_description: Stables at The Black Horse Inn features a cozy guest house with one bedroom and two bathrooms.

name: Swan Hotel
description: Located in Wotton under Edge, Swan Hotel has family rooms with private bathrooms and free WiFi. The restaurant serves British and local dishes and offers vegetarian and gluten-free options. Guests can relax at the bar or coffee shop. The staff is noted for being friendly and attentive, particularly during breakfast.
short_description: Located in Wotton under Edge, Swan Hotel has family rooms with private bathrooms and free WiFi.

name: The Ayrlington Guesthouse
description: Set in award-winning gardens, this 5-star guesthouse offers themed rooms with unique decor and modern amenities. A full English breakfast is served, and vegetarian options are also available. Guests can relax in the garden or the elegant lounge bar. The guesthouse is a 10-minute walk from Bath's historic centre.
short_description: Set in award-winning gardens, this 5-star guesthouse offers themed rooms with unique decor and modern amenities.

name: The Bell Inn
description: The Bell Inn offers family rooms with private bathrooms, TVs, and tea/coffee making facilities in Cheltenham. The pub atmosphere is complemented by friendly staff and a good location near the town center. Guests mention its clean and tidy rooms, making it a practical stop for an overnight stay.
short_description: The Bell Inn offers family rooms with private bathrooms, TVs, and tea/coffee making facilities in Cheltenham.

name: The Black Fox
description: The Black Fox, located in a historic building in Bath, offers rooms with private bathrooms and city views. The restaurant serves British cuisine and includes a bar with a terrace. Guests frequently mention the excellent breakfast and convenient location within walking distance of local sights.
short_description: The Black Fox, located in a historic building in Bath, offers rooms with private bathrooms and city views.

name: The Black Horse Inn
description: The Black Horse Inn in Dursley has comfortable rooms with private bathrooms and tea and coffee makers. It features a restaurant serving Indian cuisine, including vegan and gluten-free options. Guests can unwind in the bar and garden area. The staff is noted for their friendliness and the property has a cosy, traditional atmosphere.
short_description: The Black Horse Inn in Dursley has comfortable rooms with private bathrooms and tea and coffee makers.

name: The Boathouse
description: The Boathouse is a pub with guest accommodation overlooking the River Avon. It has landscaped gardens, a raised deck, and outdoor seating. There's a restaurant serving hearty food and a full English breakfast. Guests value the riverside location and friendly service.
short_description: The Boathouse is a pub with guest accommodation overlooking the River Avon.

name: The Broadway Hotel
description: The Broadway Hotel, a historic 16th-century building in Broadway, has 19 individually-designed bedrooms. The hotel houses The Jockey Bar with a cozy atmosphere and offers a more refined dining experience at Tattersall's Brasserie. Guests appreciate the friendly service and the excellent breakfast options.
short_description: The Broadway Hotel, a historic 16th-century building in Broadway, has 19 individually-designed bedrooms.

name: The Falcon Inn
description: The Falcon Inn offers family rooms with private bathrooms and free Wi-Fi. The restaurant serves British cuisine for brunch, lunch, and dinner with various breakfast options. The inn features outdoor seating and has a bar. Guests highlight the attentive staff and central location as key features.
short_description: The Falcon Inn offers family rooms with private bathrooms and free Wi-Fi.

name: The Fish Hotel
description: The Fish Hotel sits in a large estate and features a unique layout with separate buildings. Rooms are decorated in a contemporary style, many of which are dog-friendly. The hotel's restaurant serves seafood and light bites. Guests often note the welcoming staff and beautiful grounds during their stay.
short_description: The Fish Hotel sits in a large estate and features a unique layout with separate buildings.

name: The Fox Inn
description: The Fox Inn provides spacious family rooms with ample amenities in Hawkesbury Upton. The inn has a bar and garden area for guests to unwind. Free WiFi is available, and the pet-friendly policy caters to dog owners. Reviews mention the staff's friendliness and the clean rooms available.
short_description: The Fox Inn provides spacious family rooms with ample amenities in Hawkesbury Upton.

name: The Griffin Inn Bath
description: The Griffin Inn Bath is located in the city centre, providing easy access to local attractions. The rooms include modern amenities and a bar area. Guests note the friendly staff and the comfort of the beds. Dining options in the bar are well-regarded for their quality.
short_description: The Griffin Inn Bath is located in the city centre, providing easy access to local attractions.

name: The Hut at Bay Tree Farm
description: The Hut at Bay Tree Farm in Nympsfield offers a small ground-floor unit with a kitchenette and seating area. The property features outdoor furniture in a garden setting. It's pet-friendly and provides free WiFi. Guests appreciate the clean and well-equipped hut, although bringing food is advised as the village lacks shops.
short_description: The Hut at Bay Tree Farm in Nympsfield offers a small ground-floor unit with a kitchenette and seating area.

name: The Kennard
description: This elegant Georgian townhouse hotel is a short walk from Bath's main attractions. Rooms come with modern features like smart TVs and complimentary homemade cookies. Guests can start their day with a continental breakfast from locally sourced suppliers in a room adorned with chandeliers.
short_description: This elegant Georgian townhouse hotel is a short walk from Bath's main attractions.

name: The Lion Inn
description: Once a coaching inn from the 1500s, The Lion Inn in Winchcombe offers a restaurant and bar, plus a garden for outdoor dining. Rooms include free Bramley toiletries and unique character. Local beers and meals made from fresh ingredients are served onsite.
short_description: Once a coaching inn from the 1500s, The Lion Inn in Winchcombe offers a restaura

name: The Lygon Arms
description: The Lygon Arms in Broadway combines over 600 years of history with modern amenities. Guests can enjoy a spa, indoor pool, and various dining options featuring local produce. The property includes guest rooms with traditional décor and comfortable furnishings for relaxation.
short_description: The Lygon Arms in Broadway combines over 600 years of history with modern amenities.

name: The Painswick
description: Nestled in the Cotswold village of Painswick, this hotel overlooks Slad Valley. It includes an onsite restaurant, free WiFi, and a sun terrace with garden views. Each room has garden views, and a 24-hour front desk is available for assistance. Numerous scenic walks can be accessed from here.
short_description: Nestled in the Cotswold village of Painswick, this hotel overlooks Slad Valley.

name: The Queensberry Hotel
description: The Queensberry Hotel mixes modern style with historic architecture in central Bath. It has a restaurant, a courtyard garden, and free WiFi throughout. Each room includes luxury amenities, and the hotel serves drinks in a traditional bar. Valet parking is available at an extra cost.
short_description: The Queensberry Hotel mixes modern style with historic architecture in central Bath.

name: The Red lion
description: The Red Lion in Chipping Campden presents elegant accommodation with a garden, restaurant, and bar. Rooms have private bathrooms and various amenities for a comfortable stay. Guests often note the quality of the food and the inviting atmosphere.
short_description: The Red Lion in Chipping Campden presents elegant accommodation with a garden, restaurant, and bar.

name: The Roseate Villa Bath
description: This boutique hotel is located just a short walk from Pulteney Bridge and is surrounded by its own gardens. Each room features comfortable Hypnos beds and well-equipped bathrooms with luxury toiletries. Guests can start their day with a breakfast that includes home made smoothies, and enjoy dinner at the onsite restaurant.
short_description: This boutique hotel is located just a short walk from Pulteney Bridge and is surrounded by its own gardens.

name: The White Hart Inn
description: Set in a historic building, The White Hart Inn provides comfortable rooms with free WiFi and private bathrooms. Dining options include lunch, dinner, and high tea featuring British cuisine. The inn has a games room, sun terrace, and bar for guest enjoyment.
short_description: Set in a historic building, The White Hart Inn provides comfortable rooms with free WiFi and private bathrooms.

name: The Yard in Bath Hotel
description: The Yard in Bath Hotel provides rooms with modern amenities, free WiFi, and work desks. Guests can access a terrace and bar, and room service is available. Located near The Circus Bath and Royal Crescent, it's a short stroll to city attractions, offering a comfortable stay.
short_description: The Yard in Bath Hotel provides rooms with modern amenities, free WiFi, and work desks.

name: The Z Hotel Bath
description: Situated in Bath, The Z Hotel Bath is near the Theatre Royal and other main attractions. It features modern rooms with free WiFi and a flat-screen TV. Guests can expect friendly staff and a quiet atmosphere. The hotel has a bar and offers a convenient location for sightseeing.
short_description: Situated in Bath, The Z Hotel Bath is near the Theatre Royal and other main attractions.

name: Toghill House Farm
description: Toghill House Farm is a 17th-century guest house providing inviting accommodation and full English breakfasts. Surrounded by farmland, it offers complimentary parking and Wi-Fi. Each room has en suite facilities, and guest reviews highlight the peaceful setting and friendly service, making it a pleasant stop for hikers.
short_description: Toghill House Farm is a 17th-century guest house providing inviting accommodation and full English breakfasts.

name: Troy House
description: Troy House in Painswick offers a bed and breakfast experience with amenities including free WiFi and private bathrooms. Guests mention the friendly host and the delicious breakfast. Located near Kingsholm Stadium and Cotswold Water Park.
short_description: Troy House in Painswick offers a bed and breakfast experience with amenities including free WiFi and private bathrooms.

name: Volunteer Inn
description: Volunteer Inn is a 17th-century pub in Chipping Campden with character and history. The inn is ideally located at the start of the Cotswold Way, providing spacious rooms. Guests appreciate the comfortable stay, friendly staff, and good breakfast options. Clean facilities and a homely atmosphere are noted.
short_description: Volunteer Inn is a 17th-century pub in Chipping Campden with character and history.

name: Zen Cottage
description: Zen Cottage in Cheltenham offers bed and breakfast accommodations with gardens and private bathrooms. Each room includes a work desk and seating area. Free WiFi is available throughout the property, and guests can enjoy a relaxing garden terrace.
short_description: Zen Cottage in Cheltenham offers bed and breakfast accommodations with gardens and private bathrooms.
